name: Block Sky Rise
short_description: Welcome to Block Sky Rise – a relaxing yet engaging game where you’ll build towers while considering physics and gravity! Simple mechanics, an exciting process, and a variety of game modes for those who want to unwind and enjoy construction.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Block Sky Rise – a relaxing yet engaging game where you build towers while considering physics and gravity! Simple mechanics, exciting gameplay, and a variety of game modes make Block Sky Rise the perfect game for those who want to relax and enjoy creativity.

What awaits you in the game?

Physics and gravity: Each block falls, collides, and affects your tower's stability. Maintain balance to build the tallest structure!

Four unique game modes:

  • Classic Mode: Build your tower as high as possible. If it falls, you lose points — but you can catch ghost blocks for bonuses!

  • Precision Mode: You have three platforms, and your goal is to stack blocks perfectly to create combos and earn achievements.

  • Creative Mode: Full freedom! Use different blocks, explore a huge world, and build unique creations. Scattered stars and crystals add an element of exploration.

  • Duel Mode: Two-player mode. Take turns stacking — whoever causes the tower to fall loses!

Simple but addictive mechanics: Easy to learn, hard to master!

Relaxing atmosphere: Stylish minimalist design, soft animations, and pleasant gameplay make this a perfect way to unwind.

Ready to challenge your building skills and enjoy a meditative experience? Block Sky Rise is waiting for you!

English*, Polish*, Russian*, Ukrainian*, Czech*, Spanish - Spain*
*languages with full audio support
